title: Project scaffold + design system
desc: Xcode project, folder structure, MCColors, MCTypography, MCSpacing, core components (MCButton, MCCard, MCBadge, MCTextField, MCEmptyState)

title: Auth flow (Splash, Phone, OTP, Profile)
desc: Phone login with +91, OTP verification, Keychain token storage, profile setup with demographics

title: SwiftData models & relationships
desc: User, UserProfile, Episode, Medicine, DoseLog, CareTask, SymptomLog, ChatMessage, Nudge, EpisodeImage models with all relationships

title: Home dashboard with CTA cards
desc: Two-door CTA (Consult Doctor/Upload Prescription), active episodes, today's medication summary, upcoming tasks, greeting + profile switcher

title: Prescription upload flow
desc: Camera/gallery picker, image compression, 4-step progress UI (upload, extraction, validation, stitching)

title: AI extraction + confirmation screen
desc: Mock GPT-4V extraction service with confidence scoring, HITL confirmation gate, low-confidence amber warnings

title: Episode management (4-tab interface)
desc: Plan tab (medicines + adherence), Reminders tab (dose logs), Symptoms tab (history + charts), Files tab (documents by type)

title: Reminders engine + local notifications
desc: UserNotifications scheduling, actionable notifications (Take/Skip/Snooze), dose status logging, time-sensitive interruption level

title: Symptom tracking + daily check-in
desc: Feeling slider (terrible to great), symptom list with severity, optional vitals (temp, BP, weight), notes field

title: Multi-profile family management
desc: Up to 5 family profiles (self, spouse, parent, child, sibling), profile switching, per-profile episodes, avatar emoji selector

title: File & document management
desc: Upload documents (prescriptions, lab reports, scans, bills), thumbnail grid, detail view with edit/delete, profile-level aggregation by type

title: History & analytics dashboard
desc: Time range picker (7/14/30 days), adherence trend charts, episode history timeline, PDF export

title: Smart nudges system
desc: Missed dose detection (2+ consecutive), course ending alerts, adherence drop warnings (<70%), no symptom log reminders, 24hr dedup

title: Rich demo seed data
desc: 3 profiles (Rahul 30M, Mom 58F, Dad 62M), multiple episodes with realistic medicines, dose logs, symptom trajectories, documents

title: Design system & UI polish
desc: MCColors (teal/coral theme), MCTypography, MCSpacing, consistent card shadows, gradients, spacing fixes across all screens

title: AI Chat — core conversation engine
desc: In-app AI chat with streaming responses, context-aware system prompts, patient history assembly, medical disclaimers, action button suggestions

title: AI Chat — Groq LLM integration
desc: Groq Cloud API with Llama 3.3 70B, SSE streaming via URLSession.bytes, OpenAI-compatible format, mock fallback when no API key

title: AI Chat — emergency keyword detection
desc: Detect chest pain, breathing difficulty, suicidal ideation, severe allergy, stroke, unconscious. Hindi/Hinglish support. Show emergency UI with Call 112

title: AI Chat — chat UI with streaming
desc: Chat bubbles, typing indicator animation, message history, inline action buttons, input bar with send/mic toggle, disclaimer banner

title: Dynamic Island — Live Activities for dose reminders
desc: ActivityKit integration, compact/expanded/lock screen views, Take/Snooze/Skip buttons via deep links, countdown timer, MedCare teal branding

title: Dynamic Island — LiveActivityService
desc: Start activity 15min before dose, update countdown every 60s, auto-end 30min overdue, deep link handling for Take/Snooze/Skip actions

title: Time-sensitive notifications
desc: Added interruptionLevel .timeSensitive and relevanceScore 1.0 to dose reminders and snooze notifications for higher priority delivery

title: Fix device signing & deploy to iPhone
desc: Set DEVELOPMENT_TEAM in Xcode, configure automatic signing for both MedCare and MedCareWidgetExtension targets, build and install on physical device

title: Test Groq AI chat on physical device
desc: Verify LLM streaming works over cellular/WiFi on real device, test response quality, fallback behavior, error handling

title: Test Dynamic Island on physical device
desc: Verify Live Activities appear on Dynamic Island, test Take/Snooze/Skip buttons, countdown updates, deep link navigation

title: Test notifications on physical device
desc: Verify dose reminder notifications fire at correct times, test actionable buttons, snooze rescheduling, time-sensitive delivery

title: Welcome onboarding carousel
desc: 3-slide onboarding: Track Medicines, AI Health Chat, Family Care. Skip option, dot indicators, beautiful illustrations, only shown on first launch

notes.text: Implemented in iOS app — Swift/SwiftUI

title: Guided tour overlay on first visit
desc: Spotlight overlay highlighting key Home screen areas (doses, episodes, AI chat). Coach marks with arrows and brief text explanations

title: Quick-add medicine flow
desc: For users without prescriptions — manually add medicine name, dosage, frequency, timing in 30 seconds. Auto-create episode and schedule doses

title: Persist AI chat history across sessions
desc: Save ChatMessage array to SwiftData. Load previous conversations on app relaunch. Add 'New Chat' button to start fresh conversation

notes.text: Implemented in iOS app — Swift/SwiftUI

title: AI Chat — quick reply chips
desc: After each AI response, show 2-3 suggested follow-up questions as tappable chips below the message. Context-aware suggestions

notes.text: Implemented in iOS app — Swift/SwiftUI

title: AI Chat — voice input (Speech-to-Text)
desc: iOS Speech framework integration. Hold mic button to record, auto-transcribe to text, send as message. Support English + Hindi

title: AI Chat — structured health responses
desc: Format AI responses with clear sections: Possible Cause, What You Can Do, When to See a Doctor. Use markdown rendering in chat bubbles

title: AI Chat — share conversation as PDF
desc: Export chat history as formatted PDF to share with doctor. Include patient context, timestamps, medicine list

title: Smart snooze — learn preferred duration
desc: Track user's snooze behavior. If they always snooze 10min, default to 10min. Offer 5/10/15/30min options

title: Adherence streak tracking & celebrations
desc: Track consecutive days of 100% adherence. Show streak counter on Home screen. Celebrate milestones (7-day, 30-day) with animations

notes.text: Implemented in iOS app — Swift/SwiftUI

title: Visual dose calendar (monthly view)
desc: Monthly calendar with color-coded days: green (100%), yellow (partial), red (missed). Tap day to see dose details. Shows patterns at a glance

title: Refill reminders based on pill count
desc: Track remaining pill count per medicine. Alert 5 days before running out. Option to set total pills when adding medicine

title: Notification grouping for multiple doses
desc: Batch multiple due doses into single notification: 'Morning medicines: Paracetamol, Azithromycin, Vitamin D'. Reduces notification fatigue

title: Expanded Dynamic Island — multiple doses
desc: Show next 2-3 upcoming doses in expanded Dynamic Island view instead of just one. Daily adherence % ring

title: Siri Shortcuts integration
desc: "Hey Siri, mark my morning medicines as taken". Donate intents for common actions. App Shortcuts for iOS 16+ Shortcuts app

title: Buddy system — notify family on missed dose
desc: If dose is missed for 2+ hours, send push notification to designated family member/caregiver. Configurable per profile

title: Permission primer screens
desc: Show custom explanation screen before iOS permission dialogs (notifications, camera, health). Explain why each permission is needed

title: Real OCR — Apple Vision framework
desc: Replace mock prescription extraction with on-device Apple Vision text recognition. Extract text blocks, identify medicine names, dosages, frequencies

title: Medicine name fuzzy matching
desc: Build Indian drug database (brand names + generics). Fuzzy match extracted text against database. Handle misspellings, abbreviations, handwriting errors

title: Handwriting recognition for prescriptions
desc: Indian doctors commonly handwrite prescriptions. Train/use Vision model optimized for medical handwriting. OCR confidence scoring per field

title: Multi-page prescription stitching
desc: Allow uploading multiple photos for one prescription. Stitch and process as single document. Handle front/back of prescription

title: Auto-detect document type from photo
desc: Classify uploaded photo as prescription, lab report, bill, insurance, discharge summary. Auto-tag document type. Reduce manual selection

title: Drug interaction checker — real database
desc: Integrate DrugBank or OpenFDA API for real drug interaction data. Cross-check all active medicines across all episodes. Severity levels (minor/moderate/severe)

title: Food interaction alerts
desc: Alert users about food-medicine interactions: Ciprofloxacin + milk, Warfarin + vitamin K foods, statins + grapefruit. Show at meal-time reminders

title: Side effect tracker & correlation
desc: When user logs a symptom, auto-check if it matches known side effects of their medicines. Show correlation: 'Nausea may be caused by Azithromycin'

title: Medicine info cards
desc: Tap any medicine to see: uses, common side effects, how to take, storage, generic alternatives, manufacturer info. Data from Indian pharma database

title: Generic alternative suggestions
desc: Show cheaper generic alternatives when adding a branded medicine. Price comparison, same composition. Help users save on medicine costs

title: Symptom trend analysis
desc: Analyze logged symptoms over time. Show trends: 'Your headaches are getting less frequent'. Predict recovery trajectory vs typical recovery curve

title: Health score (0-100)
desc: Composite score from: adherence %, symptom improvement, vitals stability, task completion. Show on Home screen. Weekly trend chart

title: Weekly health summary (automated)
desc: Every Sunday, generate AI-powered health report: adherence stats, symptom trends, upcoming tasks, medicine changes, tips for improvement

title: Anomaly detection in vitals
desc: Flag unusual patterns: sudden weight change, BP spike, temperature anomaly. Alert user and suggest contacting doctor

title: AI Chat — image analysis
desc: Send photo of rash, wound, swelling in chat. AI provides initial assessment with strong disclaimer. Suggest urgency level (self-care vs doctor visit)

title: Pregnancy/lactation medicine warnings
desc: Flag medicines unsafe during pregnancy or breastfeeding when relevant profile is set. Use FDA pregnancy categories

title: Backend API design & setup
desc: Design REST API (FastAPI or Node.js). User auth, data sync endpoints, real-time WebSocket. Deploy on Railway/Supabase

title: Cloud database & data sync
desc: PostgreSQL/Supabase for user data. Real-time sync across devices. Offline-first architecture with conflict resolution

title: Data encryption & HIPAA compliance
desc: AES-256 encryption at rest, TLS 1.3 in transit. HIPAA-compliant medical data storage. Audit logging for data access

title: Account deletion & data export (GDPR)
desc: Complete data wipe on account deletion per GDPR/IT Act. Export all data as encrypted JSON/PDF. 30-day grace period

title: Caregiver dashboard
desc: One screen to see all family members' adherence. Alert feed for missed doses. One-tap call to patient. Medicine refill predictor

title: Role-based access (caregiver vs self)
desc: Define permissions: caregiver can view/remind but not modify. Self-manager has full access. Invitation flow for adding caregivers

title: Elder care mode — simplified UI
desc: Large text, simplified navigation (only 3 tabs), high contrast, big take/skip buttons, voice reminders, reduced cognitive load

title: Emergency info card
desc: Shareable card with: medicines, allergies, blood group, emergency contacts, insurance info. Show on lock screen widget. Export as image

title: Doctor profile linking
desc: Save doctor details (name, specialization, hospital, phone, registration number). Link doctors to episodes. Quick call/message buttons

title: Appointment reminders from prescriptions
desc: Extract follow-up dates from prescriptions. Auto-create calendar reminders. Show upcoming appointments on Home screen

title: Treatment summary export for doctor
desc: One-tap PDF report for doctor visit: adherence %, symptom log, vitals, medicines with timing, specific concerns. Shareable via WhatsApp/email

title: Teleconsult integration (Practo/1mg)
desc: Video call via Practo/1mg API. Auto-share patient summary before call. In-app prescription receive after consultation

title: Medicine ordering from pharmacies
desc: Order refills from 1mg/PharmEasy/Netmeds via API. Price comparison across pharmacies. Auto-refill scheduling

title: Nearby pharmacy finder (MapKit)
desc: MapKit integration to find nearby pharmacies. Show distance, ratings, medicine availability. Directions integration

title: Real OTP authentication (SMS provider)
desc: Replace mock OTP with real SMS provider (MSG91/Twilio). Rate limiting, retry logic, OTP expiry (5 min), resend cooldown

title: Adherence streak badges & celebrations
desc: Visual flame/trophy badges for streaks. Confetti animation on 7-day, 30-day milestones. Share achievement on social media

title: Daily health missions
desc: 3 daily missions: 'Log your symptoms', 'Take all doses on time', 'Check your vitals'. Progress bar, completion rewards

title: Achievement system
desc: Unlock achievements: First Week Champion, Month of Consistency, Family Health Hero, Zero Missed Week. Trophy case in profile

title: Satisfying dose-taken animations
desc: Haptic feedback + visual animation when marking dose as taken. Checkmark morph, particle effects, sound feedback

title: Medicine education cards
desc: "Did you know?" cards about user's medicines. Show one per day on Home screen. Engaging medical facts, dosing tips

title: Condition-specific health tips
desc: Curated tips based on user's conditions: diabetes diet tips, post-surgery care, BP management. AI-generated, doctor-reviewed

title: Seasonal health alerts
desc: Push notifications for dengue season, flu season, pollution alerts, heatwave warnings. Location-based relevance

title: Child care mode — gamified
desc: Fun character avatar, rewards for taking medicine, animated mascot, simple language, parent-controlled settings

title: Home screen widgets (small + medium + large)
desc: Small: next dose countdown. Medium: today's dose summary with adherence %. Large: full day schedule. Interactive take button (iOS 17+)

title: Lock screen & StandBy widgets
desc: Lock screen widget: next dose countdown. StandBy mode: bedside medicine reminder with large text and time

title: Apple Watch app
desc: Basic watch app: next dose, take/skip buttons, daily adherence ring, haptic reminders, complication for watch face

title: HealthKit integration
desc: Sync vitals from Apple Health: heart rate, steps, sleep, blood pressure, weight. Show trends alongside medicine adherence

title: iPad optimized layout
desc: Sidebar navigation on iPad. Split view: episodes list + detail. Drag-and-drop document management. Keyboard shortcuts

title: VoiceOver & accessibility audit
desc: Full screen reader support. Dynamic Type for all text sizes. High contrast mode (WCAG AAA). Reduce motion support

title: Hindi localization
desc: Full app translation to Hindi. Medicine names in Devanagari script. AI chat responses in Hindi when preferred

title: Regional language support (Tamil, Telugu, Bengali, Marathi)
desc: Top 4 Indian languages after Hindi. Localized strings, regional medicine names, voice input support

title: Freemium subscription tiers
desc: Free: 1 profile, 5 medicines, basic reminders. Pro (₹149/mo): 3 profiles, unlimited medicines, AI chat. Premium (₹299/mo): all features, family dashboard

title: StoreKit 2 in-app purchases
desc: Implement subscription management with StoreKit 2. Monthly/yearly plans, restore purchases, receipt validation, grace period handling

title: App Store listing & ASO
desc: Keywords, screenshots, preview video, description, categories. A/B test app icon. Localized listings for Hindi

title: Referral rewards program
desc: Invite family members, earn 7-day Pro trial. Share referral code. Track invitations and conversions

title: Analytics & event tracking (Mixpanel/PostHog)
desc: DAU/MAU, D1/D7/D30 retention, feature usage heatmap, funnel analysis (onboarding, prescription upload), adherence metrics

title: Crash reporting (Firebase Crashlytics)
desc: Integrate crash reporting. Target 99.5% crash-free rate. Symbolication, breadcrumbs, user context for debugging

title: In-app NPS surveys
desc: Periodic satisfaction surveys (NPS). Trigger after 7 days of use. Target NPS >50. Feedback collection for improvement

title: Unit tests — Services layer (70% coverage)
desc: Write unit tests for DataService, AIChatService, NotificationService, LiveActivityService, SmartNudgeService. XCTest framework

title: UI tests — critical user flows
desc: XCUITest for: login flow, add medicine, take dose, AI chat conversation, profile switching. Run in CI pipeline

title: SwiftLint integration
desc: Add SwiftLint for code style consistency. Configure rules, add build phase script, fix existing violations

title: Proper dependency injection
desc: Replace singletons with DI container. Inject services via @Environment. Enables better testing and modularity

title: Repository pattern for data access
desc: Abstract SwiftData behind repository interfaces. Separate concerns between service and persistence layers. Protocol-based for mocking

title: Error handling audit
desc: Ensure all network calls, file operations, and SwiftData queries have proper error states. User-friendly error messages. Retry logic

title: Performance profiling with Instruments
desc: Profile app with Xcode Instruments. Check for memory leaks, excessive allocations, slow renders. Target <2s cold start

title: Image caching for document thumbnails
desc: Cache document thumbnails in memory and disk. Lazy loading for thumbnail grids. Reduce memory footprint on Files screen

title: Feature flags (remote config)
desc: Firebase Remote Config or custom feature flag system. A/B testing, gradual rollout of new features, kill switches

title: Dark mode support
desc: Full dark mode with system toggle. Dark teal accent, dark cards, OLED-friendly pure black backgrounds. Essential for nighttime medicine-taking. Save battery on Indian OLED phones

notes.text: Competitors like Medisafe and Pillo offer dark mode. Most Indian users use phones at night for medicine reminders
Implemented in iOS app — Swift/SwiftUI

title: Dose format types — tablet, syrup, injection, drops, cream, inhaler, patch
desc: Different medicine formats need different UI: tablet shows pill count, syrup shows ml dosage, injection shows syringe icon, cream shows tube icon. Custom icons per format. Affects reminder text ('Take 2 tablets' vs 'Apply cream')

notes.text: DoseCast handles pills, injections, patches, sprays, drops — MedCare currently treats all meds as pills
Implemented in iOS app — Swift/SwiftUI

title: Pre/post meal timing labels
desc: Add meal-relative timing to doses: Before Food, After Food, With Food, Empty Stomach, Bedtime. Show as colored label on dose card. Critical for Indian prescriptions where timing matters (e.g., antacids before food, antibiotics after food)

notes.text: Indian prescriptions always specify AC/PC/HS timing. Current app doesn't capture this — big gap for Indian users
Implemented in iOS app — Swift/SwiftUI

title: Persistent alarm mode for critical medicines
desc: Option to set 'critical' alarm for must-take medicines (insulin, blood thinners, anti-seizure). Alarm rings like phone call, won't stop until user taps Take or Snooze. Inspired by Pillo app's persistent alarm tech

notes.text: Pillo's #1 differentiator is persistent alarms. Regular notifications get buried on Indian phones with heavy notification load

title: Missed dose guidance — what to do
desc: When user marks dose as missed, show guidance: 'Take now if less than 4 hours late' vs 'Skip and take next dose on time'. Medicine-specific rules. Source from drug database. Never double-dose warning

notes.text: No competitor does this well. Major safety feature — users commonly double-dose when they miss one

title: Overdose prevention — duplicate dose alert
desc: If user tries to log same dose twice within the dosing window, show warning: 'You already took this dose at 8:15 AM. Taking another may be harmful.' Require explicit confirmation to override

notes.text: TakeYourPills has overdose warning system. Safety-critical feature especially for elderly managing multiple meds
Implemented in iOS app — Swift/SwiftUI

title: 3D Touch / Haptic Touch quick actions on app icon
desc: Long-press app icon shows: Quick Add Medicine, Log Today's Doses, Open AI Chat, Scan Prescription. Jump straight to key flows without navigating

title: Satisfying dose confirmation — haptic + sound + animation
desc: When tapping 'Take' on a dose: success haptic, subtle chime sound, checkmark morph animation with particle burst. Make dose-taking feel rewarding. Inspired by Medisafe gamification

notes.text: Medisafe turns adherence into a game. Small dopamine hits for dose-taking builds habit loop
Implemented in iOS app — Swift/SwiftUI

title: Today view — consolidated daily schedule
desc: Single screen showing entire day's health schedule: morning doses at 8am, afternoon at 2pm, evening at 8pm. Timeline format with past (grayed/checked) and upcoming. Shows meals, vitals, tasks alongside medicines

notes.text: CareClinic and MyTherapy have excellent daily schedule views. Current Home screen shows doses but not in timeline format
Implemented in iOS app — Swift/SwiftUI

title: Medicine photo identification — snap strip to identify
desc: Camera feature to photograph a medicine strip/box. AI identifies medicine name, manufacturer, composition, expiry from packaging. Auto-fill fields when adding medicine. Uses CDSCO-mandated printed info on Indian packaging

notes.text: TOM Medications has photo-based identification. Combined with our dual-capture approach, this becomes very powerful for Indian market

title: Discharge summary parser
desc: Upload hospital discharge summary photo/PDF. AI extracts: diagnosis, prescribed medicines, follow-up dates, dietary restrictions, activity guidelines, warning signs. Auto-create episode + care plan from discharge

notes.text: Post-discharge is when patients need most help. Indian hospital discharge summaries follow semi-standard formats. Huge differentiator — no competitor does this

title: Lab report digitization & trend tracking
desc: Upload lab report photo. AI extracts values (HbA1c, cholesterol, CBC, thyroid panel). Track trends across reports over months. Flag abnormal values. Show alongside medicine adherence to correlate

notes.text: 1mg and Practo store reports but don't track trends. Showing HbA1c dropping while on diabetes medication is powerful motivation

title: AI-powered adherence prediction
desc: ML model predicts which patients are likely to drop off in next 3 days based on: past patterns, day of week, weather, time since prescription. Proactively intervene before they miss doses

notes.text: From AI health companion research: proactive interventions at moments where guidance is most effective. Medisafe claims 90% adherence rate with AI nudges

title: Sentiment analysis in AI chat
desc: Detect user frustration, anxiety, or confusion in chat messages. Adjust AI tone: more empathetic for anxious users, more direct for frustrated users. Flag distress patterns to nudge service

notes.text: AI health companion research recommends emotion/sentiment analysis. Indian patients may express anxiety indirectly

title: WhatsApp reminders integration
desc: Send dose reminders via WhatsApp using WhatsApp Business API. Critical for India — many users mute app notifications but always check WhatsApp. Option to send to self or family member. Include medicine name, dose, timing

notes.text: PharmEasy and 1mg both use WhatsApp for refill reminders. India has 500M+ WhatsApp users. This is the #1 channel for reaching Indian users reliably

title: WhatsApp medicine schedule sharing
desc: Share today's medicine schedule or full care plan as formatted WhatsApp message to family member/caregiver. One-tap share with pre-formatted text including medicine names, timings, and special instructions

notes.text: Indian families coordinate care via WhatsApp groups. Making it easy to share schedule builds trust and involvement

title: ABHA Health ID integration
desc: Integrate with India's Ayushman Bharat Health Account (ABHA). Link ABHA ID to profile. Pull health records from ABDM (Ayushman Bharat Digital Mission). Push MedCare records to ABHA. Interoperability with government health infra

notes.text: ABHA is India's national health ID — government is pushing adoption. Early integration = competitive advantage. Also enables pulling records from participating hospitals

title: Monthly medicine cost tracker
desc: Track cost per medicine, per episode, per month. Show total monthly/yearly medicine spend. Cost trends over time. Compare branded vs generic savings. India-specific: show MRP vs actual price paid

notes.text: Medicine cost is a major concern for Indian families. 1mg shows generic alternatives with price comparison. Tracking total spend helps families budget

title: Insurance document vault
desc: Store health insurance policies, claim forms, cashless cards. Quick access during hospital emergencies. OCR extract policy number, sum insured, TPA details. Reminder for policy renewal dates

notes.text: No health app in India manages insurance documents well. During hospital emergencies, families scramble to find policy details

title: iCloud backup & restore
desc: Auto-backup all data to iCloud (episodes, medicines, dose logs, documents, chat history). Seamless restore on new device. Encrypted backup with user's iCloud key

notes.text: Data loss is catastrophic for health apps. Users switch phones frequently in India. Must have before backend is ready

title: UPI payment for teleconsult & premium features
desc: Razorpay/PhonePe SDK integration. UPI intent flow (opens GPay/PhonePe directly), UPI QR, cards, netbanking. UPI is 80%+ of digital payments in India. ₹ currency handling

notes.text: UPI is non-negotiable for India market. Cards are secondary. PhonePe + GPay cover 85% of transactions

title: Gamified points system — earn for every healthy action
desc: Earn MedCoins: take dose on time (+10), log symptoms (+5), 100% daily adherence (+25), complete health mission (+15). Redeem for premium features trial. Leaderboard with family members. Inspired by Medisafe gamification

notes.text: Medisafe awards points, badges, raffle entries. Gamification drives 30-40% better adherence in studies. Family leaderboard adds social motivation

title: Family adherence competition
desc: Weekly family adherence challenge. Compare adherence % across family profiles. Winner gets crown badge. Push notification: 'Mom is at 95% this week — can you beat her?' Builds accountability and fun

notes.text: Medisafe lets users compete with friends/family. Indian joint families are naturally competitive about health — leverage this

title: Morning health briefing notification
desc: 8 AM daily notification: 'Good morning Gaurav! 4 medicines today, 2 appointments. Streak: 12 days. You're doing great!' Personalized, encouraging, informative. Sets up the day

notes.text: CareClinic and MyTherapy have daily health dashboards. A proactive morning notification reduces cognitive load — user knows what's ahead

title: Empty states with helpful illustrations
desc: Design beautiful empty states for: no episodes yet, no medicines, no symptoms logged, no documents. Each with illustration, helpful text, and CTA button. First impression matters

title: Pull-to-refresh with custom animation
desc: Custom pull-to-refresh animation on Home screen — teal pill dropping into container. Smooth 60fps. Refreshes dose schedule, syncs data

title: Skeleton loading screens
desc: Replace spinners with skeleton shimmer loading states on all data-heavy screens (Home, Episodes, History). Feels faster and more polished

title: Smooth page transitions & micro-interactions
desc: Custom navigation transitions between screens. Card expansion animation when opening episode. Tab bar icon bounce on tap. Subtle spring animations on buttons. Makes app feel premium

notes.text: Healthcare app design best practice: animations reduce cognitive load and make medical apps feel less clinical

title: Contextual tooltips for first-time actions
desc: Show tooltip on first use of key features: 'Swipe left to skip dose', 'Tap to add notes', 'Long-press for options'. Auto-dismiss after interaction. Track shown state in UserDefaults

title: Spotlight search integration
desc: Index medicines, episodes, and profiles in iOS Spotlight. Search 'Paracetamol' from home screen to jump directly to that medicine's schedule. CoreSpotlight framework

title: Control Center toggle for Do Not Disturb override
desc: Allow medicine reminders to break through DND/Focus modes. Critical for bedtime doses when phone is in Sleep focus. ControlWidget for iOS 18+

notes.text: Indian users frequently use DND at night. Bedtime medicines get missed because notifications are silenced
